meals.name: Savoury Egg & Sourdough with Rocket, Cherry Tomatoes & Orange
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of two soft-boiled eggs halved on toasted whole-grain sourdough, rocket leaves and halved cherry tomatoes alongside, a peeled orange in segments, natural morning light on a white ceramic plate
day_of_steps: 1. Bring a small saucepan of water to a boil. Lower 2 eggs (Diego) or 2 eggs (Diana) gently with a spoon and cook exactly 7 minutes for jammy yolks.
2. Meanwhile toast 2 slices (80g Diego) or 1.5 slices (60g Diana) whole-grain sourdough until golden.
3. Rinse 40g rocket and 60g cherry tomatoes; halve the tomatoes.
4. Transfer eggs to cold water 1 min, peel and halve. Place on toast.
5. Arrange rocket and tomatoes on the side. Drizzle 1 tsp olive oil over greens.
6. Peel and segment 1 orange per person. Serve with 500 ml water.

ingredients.item: Extra-virgin olive oil (huile d'olive vierge extra)
Extra-virgin olive oil (huile d'olive vierge extra)

meals.name: Apple & Almonds
meals.image_prompt: simple flat-lay of a sliced green apple and a small pile of whole almonds on a wooden board, natural daylight
day_of_steps: 1. Rinse and slice 1 apple per person.
2. Weigh out 25g almonds (Diego) or 20g almonds (Diana) into a small bowl.
3. Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Mexican Chicken & Chickpea Bowl with Roasted Peppers, Brown Rice & Lime
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of a vibrant bowl with sliced cumin-spiced grilled chicken breast, roasted red and yellow pepper strips, canned chickpeas, fluffy brown rice, a wedge of lime and a drizzle of olive oil, natural light on a rustic table
prep_steps: Sunday: marinate chicken breasts in cumin, paprika, garlic powder, olive oil, lime juice — refrigerate.
Sunday: grill or oven-bake chicken at 200°C for 20–22 min until cooked through; slice and store in airtight container.
Sunday: roast sliced red and yellow peppers with olive oil, cumin, salt at 200°C for 20 min; store in airtight container.
Sunday: drain and rinse canned chickpeas; portion into container.
day_of_steps: 1. Cook brown rice fresh: 60g dry (Diego) / 45g dry (Diana) in boiling salted water ~25 min; drain.
2. While rice cooks, reheat sliced chicken and roasted peppers in a pan over medium heat 3–4 min.
3. Warm chickpeas (80g Diego / 60g Diana) in the same pan 1 min.
4. Build bowl: rice base, then chickpeas, then chicken and peppers on top.
5. Squeeze lime juice over bowl. Drizzle 1 tsp (Diego) / 1 tsp (Diana) olive oil.
6. Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Blueberries & Walnuts
meals.image_prompt: close-up of a glass bowl of thick white Greek yogurt topped with fresh blueberries and crushed walnuts, soft natural afternoon light
day_of_steps: 1. Spoon 150g (Diego) or 120g (Diana) Greek yogurt into a bowl.
2. Top with 80g blueberries per person.
3. Sprinkle 15g crushed walnuts (Diego) or 12g (Diana).
4. Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Baked Salmon with Roasted Broccoli, Carrot & Quinoa Tabbouleh
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of a baked salmon fillet beside a mound of quinoa mixed with diced carrots and broccoli florets, drizzled with balsamic glaze, served on a light ceramic plate with natural evening light
prep_steps: Sunday: cook quinoa (100g dry total) in salted water 12–15 min; drain, cool, store in airtight container.
Sunday: roast broccoli florets and carrot rounds with olive oil, turmeric, black pepper at 200°C for 20 min; store.
day_of_steps: 1. Preheat oven to 200°C. Season salmon fillets (150g Diego / 120g Diana) with garlic powder, dried oregano, salt, pepper.
2. Place on a lined baking tray; bake 12–14 min until flesh flakes easily.
3. Meanwhile warm quinoa (80g cooked Diego / 60g cooked Diana) and roasted veg (80g broccoli+carrot each) in a pan 3–4 min.
4. Stir 1 tsp balsamic vinegar and 1 tsp olive oil into quinoa mixture.
5. Plate quinoa-veg base, top with salmon fillet.
6. Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Smoked Mackerel on Sourdough with Rocket, Cucumber & Strawberries
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of smoked mackerel flakes on toasted sourdough slices with rocket leaves and thin cucumber slices, a small bowl of fresh red strawberries on the side, morning light on a light linen cloth
day_of_steps: 1. Toast 80g (Diego) / 60g (Diana) whole-grain sourdough.
2. Flake smoked mackerel — 80g (Diego) / 60g (Diana) — evenly over the toast.
3. Top with 30g rocket and thin slices of 40g cucumber per person.
4. Add a squeeze of lime juice and a grind of black pepper.
5. Serve 150g strawberries on the side. Drink 500 ml water.

meals.name: Banana & Almonds
meals.image_prompt: simple flat-lay of a ripe banana beside a small bowl of whole almonds on a white plate, natural daylight
day_of_steps: 1. Peel 1 banana per person.
2. Weigh 20g almonds (Diego) / 15g almonds (Diana).
3. Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Asian Sesame Chicken Bowl with Stir-Fried Zucchini, Spinach & Brown Rice
meals.image_prompt: overhead bowl photo of sliced sesame-glazed chicken breast over brown rice with stir-fried zucchini coins and wilted spinach, drizzled with sesame oil and soy sauce, chopsticks on the side, natural light
prep_steps: Sunday: slice chicken breasts to be used Tuesday into 1cm strips; marinate in soy sauce, sesame oil, ginger powder; store raw in fridge.
day_of_steps: 1. Cook brown rice: 60g dry (Diego) / 45g dry (Diana) in boiling salted water ~25 min; drain.
2. Heat 1 tsp sesame oil in a wok or large pan over high heat.
3. Add marinated chicken strips (180g Diego / 140g Diana raw). Stir-fry 5–6 min until cooked through.
4. Add 80g sliced zucchini and 60g spinach; stir-fry 2 min until just wilted.
5. Add 1 tbsp soy sauce and 0.5 tsp ginger powder; toss.
6. Serve over rice. Top with 1 tsp sesame oil. Add 1 banana or apple on the side.
7. Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Strawberries & Walnuts
meals.image_prompt: close-up of thick Greek yogurt in a ceramic bowl topped with halved fresh strawberries and a few whole walnuts, soft natural light
day_of_steps: 1. Spoon 150g (Diego) / 120g (Diana) Greek yogurt into a bowl.
2. Hull and halve 100g strawberries per person; add on top.
3. Sprinkle 12g walnuts per person.
4. Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Mediterranean Baked Mackerel with Roasted Cherry Tomatoes, Spinach & Lentils
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of a baked mackerel fillet beside roasted cherry tomatoes and wilted spinach on a bed of green lentils, drizzled with red wine vinegar dressing on a terracotta ceramic plate, warm evening light
prep_steps: Sunday: cook dried lentils (150g dry total household) in unsalted water 20–25 min; drain, cool, store in airtight container.
day_of_steps: 1. Preheat oven to 200°C. Season mackerel fillets (130g Diego / 110g Diana) with dried thyme, paprika, salt, pepper.
2. Place on a lined baking tray with 80g cherry tomatoes per person; bake 12–14 min.
3. Meanwhile wilt 60g spinach per person in a hot dry pan 1–2 min.
4. Warm cooked lentils (90g Diego / 70g Diana) in a small saucepan with 1 tsp red wine vinegar, salt, garlic powder.
5. Plate lentils first, spinach on top, then mackerel and roasted tomatoes.
6. Drizzle 1 tsp olive oil. Serve with 500 ml water.

ingredients.item: Red wine vinegar (vinaigre de vin rouge)
Red wine vinegar (vinaigre de vin rouge)

meals.name: Two-Egg Omelette with Spinach, Cherry Tomatoes & Sourdough Toast with Orange
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of a folded omelette filled with wilted spinach and halved cherry tomatoes on a white plate, a slice of toasted sourdough on the side and a peeled orange, warm morning light
day_of_steps: 1. Whisk 2 eggs with a pinch of salt and black pepper per person.
2. Heat 0.5 tsp olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
3. Add 40g spinach and 50g halved cherry tomatoes; cook 1 min until spinach wilts.
4. Pour egg mixture over veg; cook 2–3 min until just set. Fold and slide onto plate.
5. Toast 70g (Diego) / 55g (Diana) sourdough.
6. Serve with 1 orange per person and 500 ml water.

meals.name: Apple & Walnuts
meals.image_prompt: flat-lay of a sliced red apple and a small pile of walnut halves on a wooden board, natural daylight
day_of_steps: 1. Rinse and slice 1 apple per person.
2. Weigh 20g walnuts (Diego) / 15g walnuts (Diana).
3. Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: French-Style Chicken & Lentil Salad with Rocket, Carrots & Dijon Vinaigrette
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of a French-style salad with sliced grilled chicken breast, green lentils, shredded raw carrot and rocket leaves, dressed with Dijon mustard vinaigrette, served on a large white plate in natural light
prep_steps: Sunday: grill or pan-sear chicken for Wednesday lunch (180g Diego / 140g Diana raw); slice; store separately.
day_of_steps: 1. Reheat sliced chicken (180g Diego / 140g Diana) in a pan with 1 tsp olive oil over medium heat 3–4 min.
2. Retrieve cooked lentils from prep_batch_4 (90g Diego / 70g Diana).
3. Whisk together 1 tsp Dijon mustard, 1 tsp red wine vinegar, 1 tsp olive oil, pinch black pepper per serving.
4. Build salad: rocket base, grated raw carrot (60g per person), lentils, chicken strips.
5. Drizzle dressing. Serve with 1 apple on the side and 500 ml water.

ingredients.item: Red wine vinegar (vinaigre de vin rouge)
Red wine vinegar (vinaigre de vin rouge)

meals.name: Blueberries & Almonds
meals.image_prompt: small white ceramic bowl of fresh blueberries beside a pile of whole almonds on a marble surface, natural afternoon light
day_of_steps: 1. Rinse 100g blueberries per person into a bowl.
2. Weigh 25g almonds (Diego) / 20g almonds (Diana).
3. Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Harissa Baked Chicken with Roasted Zucchini, Broccoli & Sweet Potato
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of harissa-glazed baked chicken breast beside cubed roasted sweet potato and broccoli florets, drizzled with olive oil on a terracotta plate, warm light
day_of_steps: 1. Preheat oven to 200°C. Cube 120g (Diego) / 90g (Diana) sweet potato (skin on); toss with 0.5 tsp olive oil, cumin, salt.
2. Spread sweet potato on a lined tray; roast 10 min.
3. Meanwhile coat chicken breast (150g Diego / 120g Diana) in 1 tsp harissa paste + pinch garlic powder.
4. After 10 min add chicken and 80g broccoli + 70g zucchini chunks per person to the tray.
5. Roast everything together 18–20 min until chicken reaches 75°C internal temperature.
6. Drizzle 1 tsp olive oil over veg before serving. Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Savoury Egg & Sourdough with Rocket, Cherry Tomatoes & Orange
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of two soft-boiled eggs halved on toasted whole-grain sourdough with rocket and cherry tomatoes, a peeled orange on the side, natural morning light on a white ceramic plate
day_of_steps: 1. Bring water to a boil; cook 2 eggs per person 7 min for jammy yolks.
2. Toast 80g (Diego) / 60g (Diana) sourdough.
3. Arrange 40g rocket and 60g halved cherry tomatoes on the plate; drizzle 1 tsp olive oil.
4. Peel and halve eggs; place on toast.
5. Serve 1 orange per person and 500 ml water.

meals.name: Banana & Walnuts
meals.image_prompt: simple photo of a peeled banana and small bowl of walnut halves on a white plate, natural morning light
day_of_steps: 1. Peel 1 banana per person.
2. Weigh 18g walnuts (Diego) / 15g walnuts (Diana).
3. Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Mexican Chicken & Black Bean Corn Tortilla Bowl with Roasted Peppers & Guacamole-Style Avocado
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of corn tortilla wedges arranged around a bowl of cumin-spiced chicken strips, canned white beans, roasted red pepper strips and sliced avocado, lime wedge on the side, Mexican-style on a colourful ceramic plate
day_of_steps: 1. Heat 1 tsp olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add 180g (Diego) / 140g (Diana) chicken breast strips with cumin, chili powder, garlic powder; cook 6–7 min.
2. Meanwhile warm canned white beans (80g Diego / 60g Diana drained) with 0.5 tsp cumin in a small pan.
3. Warm 2 corn tortillas (Diego) / 1.5 tortillas (Diana) in a dry pan 30 sec per side.
4. Slice and season 60g roasted red pepper from pantry OR quickly pan-roast 70g fresh red pepper 4 min.
5. Build bowl: beans, chicken strips, peppers, corn tortillas on the side.
6. Serve with 1 apple and 500 ml water.

ingredients.item: Canned white beans (haricots blancs en boîte)
Canned white beans (haricots blancs en boîte)

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Blueberries & Almonds
meals.image_prompt: a bowl of creamy Greek yogurt topped with fresh blueberries and a few whole almonds, soft natural light on a white surface
day_of_steps: 1. Spoon 150g (Diego) / 120g (Diana) Greek yogurt into a bowl.
2. Top with 80g blueberries per person.
3. Sprinkle 15g almonds (Diego) / 12g almonds (Diana).
4. Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Salmon & Chickpea Traybake with Roasted Zucchini, Celery & Tomato-Harissa Sauce
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of a roasted salmon fillet on a bed of chickpeas, sliced zucchini and celery in a terracotta harissa tomato sauce in a roasting tin, drizzled with olive oil, dramatic natural light
day_of_steps: 1. Preheat oven to 200°C. In a roasting tin mix drained chickpeas (70g Diego / 55g Diana), sliced zucchini (80g each), sliced celery (40g each), 2 tbsp tomato paste, 1 tsp harissa, 0.5 tsp cumin, 1 tsp olive oil, splash of water.
2. Roast veg/chickpea mixture 10 min.
3. Nestle salmon fillets (150g Diego / 120g Diana) into the tin; season with garlic powder, paprika, salt.
4. Roast further 12–14 min until salmon is just cooked.
5. Plate chickpea veg base, top with salmon. Drizzle remaining tray juices. Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Smoked Mackerel on Sourdough with Cucumber, Rocket & Strawberries
meals.image_prompt: close-up photo of smoked mackerel on toasted sourdough slices with thin cucumber rounds and rocket on top, a small plate of strawberries beside it, bright morning light
day_of_steps: 1. Toast 80g (Diego) / 60g (Diana) sourdough until crisp.
2. Flake 80g (Diego) / 60g (Diana) smoked mackerel onto toast.
3. Layer thin cucumber slices (40g) and rocket (25g) per person on top.
4. Squeeze a little lime juice, grind black pepper.
5. Serve 150g strawberries alongside and 500 ml water.

meals.name: Apple & Almonds
meals.image_prompt: overhead flat-lay of a sliced apple and a handful of almonds on a white plate, bright natural light
day_of_steps: 1. Rinse and slice 1 apple per person.
2. Weigh 25g almonds (Diego) / 20g almonds (Diana).
3. Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Asian Ginger Mackerel with Stir-Fried Bell Peppers, Broccoli & Soba-Style Whole-Wheat Noodles
meals.image_prompt: overhead bowl of pan-seared mackerel fillet over whole-wheat noodles with stir-fried red and yellow bell pepper strips and broccoli florets, soy-ginger glaze, sesame oil drizzle, natural light, Asian aesthetic
day_of_steps: 1. Cook 60g (Diego) / 45g (Diana) dry whole-wheat pasta/noodles in boiling salted water per pack instructions (~10 min); drain.
2. Heat 1 tsp sesame oil in a pan; stir-fry 60g bell pepper strips and 80g broccoli per person 3–4 min over high heat.
3. Add 0.5 tsp ginger powder, 1 tbsp soy sauce; toss and set aside.
4. In the same pan, add 0.5 tsp olive oil; pan-sear mackerel fillet (120g Diego / 100g Diana raw) skin-side down 3 min, flip 2 min.
5. Toss noodles with veg and soy-ginger sauce.
6. Plate noodles, top with mackerel. Serve with blueberries (80g) and 500 ml water.

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Strawberries
meals.image_prompt: simple photo of a white bowl of thick Greek yogurt topped with sliced fresh strawberries, soft afternoon natural light
day_of_steps: 1. Spoon 150g (Diego) / 130g (Diana) Greek yogurt into a bowl.
2. Hull and slice 100g strawberries per person; arrange on top.
3. Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Cumin Chicken Thighs (Boneless Skinless) with Roasted Carrots, Spinach & Whole-Wheat Couscous
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of golden cumin-spiced chicken thighs on a bed of whole-wheat couscous with roasted carrot rounds and wilted spinach, drizzled with olive oil, rustic white plate, warm evening light
day_of_steps: 1. Preheat oven to 200°C. Rub chicken thighs (160g Diego / 125g Diana raw) with cumin, garlic powder, paprika, olive oil, salt.
2. Slice 80g carrots per person into rounds; toss with 0.5 tsp olive oil, turmeric, black pepper.
3. Place chicken and carrots on a lined tray; roast 22–25 min.
4. Meanwhile pour 60g (Diego) / 45g (Diana) dry whole-wheat couscous into a bowl; add equal volume of boiling water + pinch salt; cover 5 min; fluff with fork.
5. In the last 2 min of roasting, place 60g spinach per person on the tray; let it wilt.
6. Plate couscous, top with spinach, carrots and chicken. Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Two-Egg Omelette with Bell Pepper, Spinach & Sourdough with Blueberries
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of a golden folded omelette filled with colourful bell pepper strips and spinach, slices of toasted sourdough on the side, a bowl of fresh blueberries, natural morning light on a wooden table
day_of_steps: 1. Dice 40g red bell pepper per person finely.
2. Heat 0.5 tsp olive oil in a non-stick pan; sauté pepper 2 min, add 30g spinach, cook 1 min until wilted.
3. Whisk 2 eggs with salt and black pepper; pour over veg; cook on medium 2–3 min; fold and plate.
4. Toast 70g (Diego) / 55g (Diana) sourdough.
5. Serve with 100g blueberries per person and 500 ml water.

meals.name: Apple & Walnuts
meals.image_prompt: flat-lay of a crisp sliced apple and a cluster of walnut halves on a rustic wooden board, natural light
day_of_steps: 1. Rinse and slice 1 apple per person.
2. Weigh 20g walnuts (Diego) / 15g walnuts (Diana).
3. Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Mediterranean Salmon & Lentil Bowl with Roasted Zucchini, Cherry Tomatoes & Balsamic Dressing
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of a rustic bowl with pan-seared salmon chunks, green lentils, roasted zucchini and cherry tomatoes, drizzled with balsamic vinegar dressing on a white linen background, natural light
day_of_steps: 1. Preheat oven to 200°C. Toss 80g sliced zucchini and 70g cherry tomatoes per person with 0.5 tsp olive oil, dried oregano, salt; roast 15 min.
2. Meanwhile warm canned chickpeas (60g Diego / 50g Diana drained) in a small pan with 0.5 tsp cumin.
3. Pan-sear salmon fillet (150g Diego / 120g Diana raw) in 0.5 tsp olive oil, 3–4 min per side.
4. Whisk 1 tsp balsamic vinegar + 1 tsp olive oil + pinch garlic powder as dressing.
5. Build bowl: chickpeas and roasted veg base, flaked salmon on top, drizzle dressing.
6. Serve with 1 orange per person and 500 ml water.

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Blueberries & Walnuts
meals.image_prompt: glass bowl of white Greek yogurt topped with scattered blueberries and crushed walnuts, natural afternoon light on a marble surface
day_of_steps: 1. Spoon 150g (Diego) / 120g (Diana) Greek yogurt into a bowl.
2. Top with 80g blueberries per person.
3. Sprinkle 15g walnuts (Diego) / 12g walnuts (Diana).
4. Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Spiced Chicken & White Bean Traybake with Roasted Bell Peppers & Celery
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of golden-baked chicken breast with white beans, roasted red and yellow pepper strips and celery in a roasting tin, dusted with paprika and herbs, rustic ceramic tin, warm evening light
day_of_steps: 1. Preheat oven to 200°C. In a roasting tin combine drained white beans (80g Diego / 60g Diana), sliced bell peppers (60g red + 40g yellow per person), sliced celery (40g each), 1 tsp olive oil, paprika, dried thyme, garlic powder, salt.
2. Nestle chicken breasts (150g Diego / 120g Diana raw) on top; rub with paprika, garlic powder, olive oil, salt.
3. Roast 25–28 min until chicken is cooked through (internal temp 75°C).
4. Plate beans and veg, top with sliced chicken. Drizzle pan juices. Serve with 500 ml water.

ingredients.item: Canned white beans (haricots blancs en boîte)
Canned white beans (haricots blancs en boîte)

meals.name: Smoked Mackerel on Sourdough with Rocket, Cucumber & Strawberries
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of smoked mackerel flakes on toasted sourdough with rocket and cucumber, a bowl of fresh strawberries on the side, Sunday morning light on a bright linen tablecloth
day_of_steps: 1. Toast 80g (Diego) / 60g (Diana) sourdough until crisp.
2. Flake 80g (Diego) / 60g (Diana) smoked mackerel onto toast.
3. Arrange 25g rocket and 50g thin cucumber slices per person on top.
4. Squeeze lime juice, add black pepper.
5. Serve 150g strawberries on the side with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Banana & Almonds
meals.image_prompt: ripe banana and small bowl of almonds on a white ceramic plate, bright natural Sunday morning light
day_of_steps: 1. Peel 1 banana per person.
2. Weigh 20g almonds (Diego) / 15g almonds (Diana).
3. Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Moroccan-Spiced Chicken & Lentil Couscous Bowl with Roasted Carrots & Zucchini
meals.image_prompt: overhead bowl of fluffy whole-wheat couscous topped with cumin-coriander spiced chicken slices, tender lentils, roasted carrot rounds and zucchini, drizzled with harissa-infused olive oil, natural bright light, Moroccan ceramic bowl
day_of_steps: 1. Preheat oven to 200°C. Toss carrot rounds (80g per person) and zucchini chunks (70g per person) with 0.5 tsp olive oil, cumin, turmeric, salt; roast 20 min.
2. Season chicken breast (180g Diego / 140g Diana raw) with cumin, garlic powder, paprika; pan-sear in 0.5 tsp olive oil 5–6 min per side.
3. Pour dry couscous (60g Diego / 45g Diana) into bowl; add equal volume boiling water + pinch salt + 0.5 tsp harissa; cover 5 min; fluff.
4. Warm canned lentils (80g Diego / 60g Diana drained) in pan with red wine vinegar 1 min.
5. Build bowl: couscous, lentils, roasted veg, sliced chicken.
6. Serve with 1 orange and 500 ml water.

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Blueberries & Almonds
meals.image_prompt: overhead ceramic bowl of creamy Greek yogurt topped with blueberries and slivered almonds, soft window light on Sunday afternoon
day_of_steps: 1. Spoon 150g (Diego) / 120g (Diana) Greek yogurt into a bowl.
2. Top with 80g blueberries per person.
3. Sprinkle 15g almonds (Diego) / 12g almonds (Diana).
4. Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Baked Salmon with Spinach, Roasted Cherry Tomatoes & Sweet Potato Wedges
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of a herb-baked salmon fillet beside roasted sweet potato wedges and wilted spinach with burst cherry tomatoes, drizzled with olive oil on a white ceramic plate, warm Sunday evening light
day_of_steps: 1. Preheat oven to 200°C. Slice sweet potato (120g Diego / 90g Diana) into wedges (skin on); toss with 0.5 tsp olive oil, garlic powder, paprika, salt.
2. Roast sweet potato wedges 10 min.
3. Add salmon fillets (150g Diego / 120g Diana raw) seasoned with dried oregano, turmeric, salt to the tray; add 70g cherry tomatoes per person.
4. Roast 14–15 min until salmon flakes.
5. In the last 2 min, scatter 60g spinach per person over the tray; let wilt in oven heat.
6. Plate with sweet potato wedges, spinach and tomatoes beside salmon. Serve with 500 ml water.
